evals.prompt: I have a Figma design for a product card component. It has an image at the top, a title with bold text, a description below it, and two buttons at the bottom (one primary blue button on the left, one secondary outline button on the right). The card has a white background, rounded corners (#8px radius), and a subtle drop shadow. Generate a React component that matches this design exactly.
assertions: Output is a valid React component (.jsx or .tsx)
Component renders an image element at the top
Component has a title with bold/semibold font weight
Component has two buttons: one filled/primary and one outlined/secondary
Component applies rounded corners (border-radius or Tailwind rounded-*)
Component applies a box shadow
Output includes a Figma match comment or metadata block
Component file is complete and runnable (not a stub or pseudocode)

evals.prompt: Create a Vue 3 component from this Figma design: a navigation header with a logo on the left, a horizontal menu with 5 items in the center, and a search bar with an icon on the right. The header background is dark blue (#1E3A8A), all text is white, and there is a 1px white border at the bottom. Make it responsive for mobile (hamburger menu) and desktop.
assertions: Output is a Vue 3 single-file component (.vue) with <template>, <script>, and <style> sections
Header background color is #1E3A8A or equivalent (blue-900 Tailwind)
Text color is white
Navigation includes 5 menu items
Component includes responsive logic: a hamburger/toggle for mobile and full nav for desktop
A search bar or input with an icon is present
A border at the bottom of the header is applied

evals.prompt: A landing page hero section from Figma has a gradient background (blue to purple), a large headline text (48px), a subtitle below it (18px), and a call-to-action button with white text on an orange background. Generate vanilla HTML + CSS. The section should be 100% width and full viewport height with centered content.
assertions: Output is a standalone HTML file with embedded CSS
Background uses a CSS gradient from blue to purple (linear-gradient with blue and purple stops)
Headline font size is approximately 48px
Subtitle font size is approximately 18px
A button exists with orange/amber background and white text
Section height is 100vh or equivalent
Content is vertically and horizontally centered (flexbox or grid)

evals.prompt: I need to convert this Figma design to a React component but I don't have browser automation set up. The design shows a simple login form: two input fields (email and password), a 'Sign In' button, and a 'Forgot password?' link underneath. Use Tailwind CSS.
assertions: Output is a valid React component
Component includes two input fields: one for email (type=email) and one for password (type=password)
Component includes a submit/sign-in button
Component includes a 'Forgot password' or similar link
Tailwind CSS classes are used for styling
The skill notes that SSIM validation was skipped due to missing browser automation
Component is complete and runnable

evals.prompt: Generate a TypeScript React component from this Figma spec: a pricing card with three tiers (Basic, Pro, Enterprise). Each tier shows: a tier name, a monthly price, a list of 4 features with checkmark icons, and a CTA button. The Pro tier should be visually highlighted (different background). Use Tailwind CSS.
assertions: Output is a valid TypeScript React component (.tsx)
Component renders three pricing tiers: Basic, Pro, Enterprise
Each tier includes a name, price, feature list (at least 4 items), and a button
Feature list items use a checkmark icon or checkmark character
The Pro tier is visually distinct from the others (different background, border, or highlight)
Tailwind CSS classes are used
Component includes proper TypeScript types or interfaces
